code_before_change:
def update_params
    params.
      require(:article).
      permit(:allow_comments,
             :allow_pings,
             :body,
             :body_and_extended,
             :draft,
             :extended,
             :permalink,
             :published_at,
             :text_filter_name,
             :title,
             :keywords)
  end

  def default_text_filter
    current_user.text_filter || this_blog.text_filter
  end
end
code_after_change:
def update_params
    params.
      require(:article).
      permit(:allow_comments,
             :allow_pings,
             :body,
             :body_and_extended,
             :draft,
             :extended,
             :password,
             :permalink,
             :published_at,
             :text_filter_name,
             :title,
             :keywords)
  end

  def default_text_filter
    current_user.text_filter || this_blog.text_filter
  end
end
cve_description: Business Logic Errors in GitHub repository publify/publify prior to 9.2.7.
